arts.ttl: Report: Bayern considering re-signing young star from Juventus
arts.sum: Bayern Munich are exploring a move to bring Kenan Yildiz back from Juventus, according to Tuttosport.

arts.ttl: Uli Hoeneß talks the “absolute disaster” of the 2023/24 season which was “pretty much the worst thing that could happen to FC Bayern”
arts.sum: In Thomas Tuchel’s first full season, Bayern were dumped from the DFB-Pokal in the second round by a third division side and not only lost its’ streak of 11 league titles in a row to a dominant Bayer Leverkusen side but even saw VfB Stuttgart pip them in the standings, dropping them to third in the table at the very last matchday. It seems Hoeneß wants to first restore the Bavarians’ dominance in Germany and ensuring there is no horrible, terrible, no good, very bad trophy-less season this year.

arts.ttl: Champions League Preview: Inter vs Bayern Munich – Team News, Line-ups & Prediction
arts.sum: Stadio Giuseppe Meazza forms the backdrop for the second leg of a mouth-watering Champions League quarter-final tie between Inter and Bayern Munich. Simone Inzaghi's charges head into proceedings on the front foot after taking an all-important first-leg lead at the Allianz Arena last weekend. arts.ttl: 8 players who represented Bayern Munich and Inter Milan
arts.sum: He hit 13 league goals in his first season in Italy before scoring three times on the way to winning the 1990 World Cup. Along with his two Germany teammates, Klinsmann started both legs of the 1991 UEFA Cup decider as Inter edged Roma 2-1 on aggregate. European giants Bayern Munich and Inter Milan meet in the return leg of the 2024/25 UEFA Champions League quarter-finals on Wednesday - a good excuse to shed light on some top players who have turned out for both clubs.

arts.ttl: Inter Milan vs Bayern Munich – Combined XI
arts.sum: Inter Milan and Bayern Munich meet in the Champions League quarter-finals tonight, with the tie delicately poised ahead of the San Siro second leg. It’s the leaders of Serie A against the Bundesliga table-toppers, with both sides brimming with talent. Ahead of the clash, we’ve picked out our Inter and Bayern Munich Combined XI. arts.ttl: Bayern Munich’s Harry Kane takes comfort in his professional preparation to ward off big game nerves
arts.sum: “I feel like if you take care of all those things, then you can go into the game with a clear mind and just use those nerves as a good feeling to go out there and perform — understanding that it’s normal and it just means that you care about the situation. To become one of the best footballers in the world, you need to perform on the biggest of stages.

arts.ttl: Is Bayern Munich legend Thomas Müller heading to the Serie A?

arts.ttl: BFW Question of the Day — April 16th, 2025: What’s your prediction for Inter Milan vs. Bayern Munich in the Champions League?
arts.sum: Down 2-1 on aggregate, Bayern Munich needs an incredible effort and big-time performances from its key players. Bayern Munich will try to salvage its Champions League season at San Siro today against Inter Milan .
